recommendations.title: Deathgasm
recommendations.overview: Two teenage boys unwittingly summon an ancient evil entity known as The Blind One by delving into black magic while trying to escape their mundane lives.

recommendations.title: The Empty Man
recommendations.overview: On the trail of a missing girl, an ex-cop comes across a secretive group attempting to summon a terrifying supernatural entity.

recommendations.title: Malicious
recommendations.overview: A young college professor and his pregnant wife unwittingly release a malevolent entity with murderous intentions.

recommendations.title: The Bye Bye Man
recommendations.overview: When three college students move into an old house off campus, they unwittingly unleash a supernatural entity known as The Bye Bye Man, who comes to prey upon them once they discover his name. The friends must try to save each other, all the while ke

recommendations.title: Demonic
recommendations.overview: A police officer and a psychologist investigate the deaths of five people who were killed while trying to summon ghosts.

recommendations.title: House
recommendations.overview: Hoping to find a sense of connection to her late mother, Gorgeous takes a trip with her friends to visit her aunt's ancestral house in the countryside. The girls soon discover that there is more to the old house than meets the eye.

recommendations.title: DeVour
recommendations.overview: Friends become increasingly addicted to a video game that has an evil agenda.

recommendations.title: The Exorcist
recommendations.overview: When a mysterious entity possesses a young girl, her mother seeks the help of two Catholic priests to save her life.

recommendations.title: The Exorcism of Carmen Farias
recommendations.overview: Carmen, a brave journalist, discovers soon after her mother's death that she has inherited her grandma's house. She decides to move there without knowing it hides dark secrets.

recommendations.title: The Cellar
recommendations.overview: When Keira Woods' daughter mysteriously vanishes in the cellar of their new house in the country, she soon discovers there is an ancient and powerful entity controlling their home that she will have to face or risk losing her family's souls forever.
